hero.title: Trusted professionals in Maresme
hero.subtitle: Find electricians, plumbers, carpenters and more — all verified by your local community.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, trade or location...

contact.unavailableUnlock: We're updating this tradesman's contact info. Please check back later.

profile.contactProtected: Contact information is protected for community members.

unlock.title: Protected community
unlock.description: To protect our professionals from spam and keep the community local, you need to register as a Maresme resident.
unlock.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account — Sign in

auth.residentDesc: Join the Maresme community to contact trusted professionals.

auth.protectPros: Your registration helps protect professionals from spam
auth.directAccess: Get direct access to verified professionals

auth.accountCreated: Account created. Check your email to confirm.

auth.roleResidentDesc: I'm looking for trusted professionals for my home
auth.roleTradesmanDesc: I want to offer my services to the community

claim.title: Claim your profile
claim.desc: If you're already listed in the directory, enter your phone number to claim your profile.
claim.successDesc: Your professional profile has been linked to your account. You can now manage it from your dashboard.
claim.notFoundDesc: No unclaimed profile was found with that phone number.

dashboard.title: My Professional Dashboard
dashboard.updateDesc: Update your information so clients can find you.
dashboard.createDesc: Create your profile to appear in the directory.
dashboard.publicInfo: This information will be publicly visible.
dashboard.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell the community about yourself and your experience...
dashboard.additionalTradesDesc: Select other trades you also handle
dashboard.availableDesc: Show that you're accepting new clients
dashboard.neighborInterestDesc: Neighbors who have unlocked your contact recently.
dashboard.noInterestYet: No interested neighbors yet. Complete your profile to attract more clients!
dashboard.reviewsDesc: Reviews left by neighbors about your work.
dashboard.noReviewsYet: No reviews yet. Do great work and neighbors will rate you!
dashboard.upgradeProDesc: Feature your profile, appear first in search, and access advanced analytics.
dashboard.noUnlocksYet: You haven't unlocked any contacts yet. Browse the directory to find a professional.
dashboard.noSavedYet: No saved professionals yet. Save your favorites from the directory!
dashboard.noReviewsGivenYet: You haven't left any reviews yet.

reviews.tooEarly: You must wait 24 hours after unlocking the contact to leave a review.

footer.tagline: Professionals verified by the Maresme and Barcelona community.

index.tryChangingFilters: Try changing the filters or search.
